reviews.comment:
El acceso no es el mejor,es complicado llegar al Acá de Colon,porque el camino no está señalizado,tener en cuenta que este camino es de ripio.
La atención de sus empleados es muy buena!

(Translated by Google)
Access isn't the best; it's difficult to get to Acá de Colon because the road isn't marked. Keep in mind that this road is gravel.
The staff is very attentive!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMlpxQWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Me gustaría SEÑALIZACIÓN MAS IMPORTANTE. Otra empresa similar se encuentra antes transitando por colectora, y se trata de una ACA.

(Translated by Google)
I would like more prominent signage. Another similar company is located further along the service road, and it's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
